notable_phrases: AI business is on track to surpass an annual revenue run rate of $10 billion next quarter, which will make it the fastest business in our history to reach this milestone
some of the demand issues we have, our ability to fulfill demand is because of, in fact, external third-party stuff that we leased moving up
we'll be better able to do some supply-demand matching, and hence why we're talking about acceleration in the back half
summary: Microsoft reported strong AI momentum with cloud revenue exceeding $38.9 billion but acknowledged near-term supply constraints limiting Azure growth while expressing confidence in second-half acceleration as capacity comes online.
change_summary: vs 2024 Q4: Analyst pushback level decreased by 10.00.
